# Sítio Girassol — Complete Property Information

> Vacation rental with private pool on 2.6 hectares of preserved Atlantic Forest in São Roque, SP, Brazil — 60 km from São Paulo

---

## 1. Property Description

### English

Sítio Girassol is a private vacation rental property located in São Roque, São Paulo state, Brazil. The property sits on two plateaus spanning 2.6 hectares (6.4 acres) of preserved Atlantic Forest nature. Built in 2010, the 280 sqm chalet-style house accommodates up to 6 guests across 3 bedrooms and 3 bathrooms.

The upper plateau features the swimming pool, game room, and a BBQ grill, with access to the main house's second floor where the master suite is located with a king bed and access to a common balcony with hammock supports. The second spacious bedroom has a large window and double bed, and the third bedroom has a bunk bed with additional single mattresses. There is a bathroom with glass shower enclosure and electric shower.

On the ground floor there is a large covered balcony and BBQ grill, a living room with smart TV, fireplace, and access to a secondary balcony with beautiful sunset views. The kitchen and living room share the open-plan space. The property includes various board games, hammocks for resting, tennis and volleyball court, balls and pump, and mosquito repellent equipment.

The property is fully fenced and completely private — guests have exclusive use of all facilities including the pool, BBQ areas, sports courts, and all 2.6 hectares of land.

### Portugues

Sítio Girassol é uma propriedade para aluguel de temporada localizada em São Roque, estado de São Paulo, Brasil. A propriedade está em dois platôs com 2,6 hectares de natureza preservada de Mata Atlântica. Construída em 2010, a casa estilo chalé de 280 m² acomoda até 6 hóspedes em 3 quartos e 3 banheiros.

Terreno em dois platôs mais 2,6 hectares de natureza. Piscina, sala de jogos e churrasqueira no platô superior, com acesso ao segundo andar da casa principal onde está a suíte principal com cama king e acesso a varanda comum com suporte para redes. Segundo quarto espaçoso com janelão e cama de casal, terceiro quarto com cama beliche e mais colchões avulsos, e banheiro com box de vidro e chuveiro elétrico. No primeiro andar há uma grande varanda coberta e churrasqueira, sala com TV smart, lareira, e acesso a uma varanda secundária com belo visual do pôr do Sol. A cozinha e a sala compartilham o espaço. Diversos jogos de tabuleiro, redes para descansar, rede de tênis e vôlei, bolas e enchedor, equipamentos contra mosquitos.

---

## 2. Property Specifications

- Type: Entire place - House (Chalet)
- Year built: 2010
- Total area: 280 sqm (house) on 2.6 hectares (land)
- Bedrooms: 3
  - Bedroom 1: Master suite with king bed and balcony access
  - Bedroom 2: Spacious room with large window and double bed
  - Bedroom 3: Bunk bed with additional single mattresses
- Beds: 4
- Bathrooms: 3
- Maximum guests: 6
- Categories: Countryside, Tropical
- Two levels (ground floor + second floor)

---

## 3. Complete Amenity List

### Bathroom
- Baby bath (always available at listing)
- Body soap
- Hair dryer
- Hot water (sink and shower)
- Outdoor shower
- Cleaning products

### Bedroom and Laundry
- Bed linens
- Crib (standard, always available, room-darkening shades, sheets provided)
- Extra pillows and blankets
- Room-darkening shades
- Clothing storage
- Hangers
- Washer
- Iron
- Drying rack for clothing

### Entertainment
- TV (smart TV)
- Books and reading material
- Board games
- Game room with foosball

### Sports Courts
- Tennis equipment
- Volleyball equipment
- Football / Soccer equipment
- Badminton equipment

### Heating and Cooling
- Ceiling fan
- Portable fans
- Heating (portable heater)
- Indoor fireplace

### Internet and Office
- Wi-Fi (wireless internet throughout the property)
- Dedicated workspace (desk/table with power source)

### Kitchen and Dining
- Kitchen (full kitchen — guests can cook; includes refrigerator, oven, stovetop)
- Refrigerator
- Freezer
- Stove
- Oven
- Microwave
- Cooking basics (pots and pans, oil, salt and pepper)
- Dishes and silverware (plates, bowls, cups, cutlery)
- Dining table
- Coffee maker
- Coffee
- Toaster
- Baking sheet
- Blender
- Rice maker
- Barbecue utensils (fuel and utensils for grilling)

### Outdoor / Location Features
- Backyard (private, fully fenced)
- BBQ grill (2 grills — covered balcony + outdoor kitchen by pool)
- Fire pit
- Outdoor dining area
- Outdoor furniture
- Outdoor kitchen (private, with oven)
- Patio or balcony
- Pool (private swimming pool)
- Sun loungers
- Hammock
- Private entrance (exclusive to guests)
- Private living room

### Parking and Facilities
- Free parking on premises
- Free street parking

### Services
- Pets allowed
- Smoking allowed (smoking, vaping, and e-cigarettes)
- Long term stays allowed (28+ days)

---

## 4. Pricing Details

| Duration | Rate | Discount |
|----------|------|----------|
| 1 night | R$ 340 BRL | - |
| 7+ nights (weekly) | R$ 228/night | 33% off |
| 28+ nights (monthly) | R$ 170/night | 50% off |

- Currency: Brazilian Real (BRL)
- Check-in: 12:00 PM - 8:00 PM
- Check-out: Before 6:00 PM
- Self check-in available
- Building staff available 24 hours

---

## 5. Location

- City: São Roque, São Paulo State, Brazil
- Coordinates: -23.4907, -47.2706
- Distance from São Paulo city center: approximately 60 km (~1-1.5 hours drive)
- Region: São Roque countryside, near the Rota do Vinho (Wine Route)
- Surrounded by preserved Atlantic Forest (Mata Atlantica)

### Google Maps
- Map embed: https://www.google.com/maps?q=-23.49073257663386,-47.270569464393205&output=embed
- Full map: https://www.google.com/maps?q=-23.49073257663386,-47.270569464393205

---

## 6. Directions from São Paulo

### English
From São Paulo, the best route is via Rodovia Castello Branco, exit at km 54B to access Rodovia Raposo Tavares, or follow directly via Raposo. Follow the "Girassol" signs when approaching. The exact location is provided after reservation confirmation.

### Portugues
Saindo de São Paulo, a melhor alternativa é ir pela Rodovia Castello Branco e sair no km 54B para acessar a Rodovia Raposo Tavares, ou seguir diretamente pela Raposo. Siga as placas "Girassol" quando estiver chegando perto. A localização exata é fornecida após a confirmação da reserva.

### Espanol
Desde São Paulo, la mejor ruta es por Rodovia Castello Branco, salida en km 54B para acceder a Rodovia Raposo Tavares, o seguir directamente por Raposo. Siga las señales "Girassol" al acercarse. La ubicación exacta se proporciona después de la confirmación de la reserva.

---

## 7. Shopping and Nearby Services

- Mercado Figueira: 12 km before the property (market, butcher, wine shop, tobacco shop) — https://maps.app.goo.gl/uc15RYv9sPc9Euij8
- Farmácia (pharmacy): 12 km before the property — https://maps.app.goo.gl/WATMaV2xWTJHARhT6
- Panificadora e frango de padaria (bakery): 5 km before the property — https://maps.app.goo.gl/zaotkbtZU7FLkL7C9
- Mercearia Figueiras, açougue, adega, tabacaria Siqueira (grocery, butcher, wine, tobacco): 5 km before the property — https://maps.app.goo.gl/uc15RYv9sPc9Euij8

---

## 8. House Rules

- Pets allowed
- Events allowed
- Smoking, vaping, and e-cigarettes allowed
- No quiet hours
- Commercial photography and filming allowed
- Maximum 6 guests
- Check-in between 12:00 PM and 8:00 PM
- Check-out before 6:00 PM
- Please do not use glass objects in the pool area
- Collect all cigarette butts and small garbage that falls on the floor during your stay

---

## 9. Swimming Pool Information

### Pool Rules
- Do not use glass objects in the pool area
- Please use plastic or other safe materials for drinks and food by the pool

### Pool Maintenance
- Please contact the host for the current pool cleaning schedule

### Pool Features
- Private pool, exclusive to guests
- Sun loungers available
- Located on the upper plateau of the property
- Outdoor shower nearby

---

## 10. Nearby Attractions

### São Roque Wine Route (Rota do Vinho)
São Roque is known as the "Land of Wine" (Terra do Vinho). The Wine Route features over 30 wineries and cellars open for visits. Notable wineries include Vinícola Góes (the oldest in the region) and Villa Santa Maria.

### Nature and Outdoor Activities
- Atlantic Forest trails and ecological walks
- Hills and waterfalls in the surrounding region
- Offroad trails on the property's 2.6 hectares
- Tennis and volleyball courts on-site
- Football and badminton equipment available

### Gastronomy
São Roque is famous for Italian and contemporary restaurants. Local wine paired with artisanal cheeses is a highlight.

---

## 11. Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

**Q: Where is Sítio Girassol located?**
A: Sítio Girassol is located in São Roque, SP, approximately 60 km from São Paulo. Access is via Rodovia Castello Branco or Raposo Tavares highway.

**Q: How many bedrooms does Sítio Girassol have?**
A: There are 3 bedrooms: master suite with king bed, second bedroom with double bed, and third with bunk bed plus extra mattresses. Capacity for up to 6 guests.

**Q: Is the pool private?**
A: Yes, the pool is completely private, exclusive to guests. The property spans 2.6 hectares and is fully fenced.

**Q: Are pets allowed?**
A: Yes! Sítio Girassol is pet-friendly. Pets are welcome on the property.

**Q: What is the nightly rate?**
A: Rates start at R$ 340 per night. We offer 33% weekly and 50% monthly discounts.

**Q: Is there a BBQ grill?**
A: Yes, the property has two BBQ grills: one on the covered balcony and another in the outdoor kitchen by the pool.

**Q: Is there Wi-Fi?**
A: Yes, the property offers high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the house.

**Q: What activities can I do at the sitio?**
A: Offroad trails, swimming pool, BBQ, tennis and volleyball court, board games, hammocks, fireplace, and nature contemplation across 2.6 hectares of preserved land.

**Q: How do I get there from São Paulo?**
A: Take Rodovia Castello Branco and exit at km 54B to access Rodovia Raposo Tavares, or follow directly via Raposo. The trip takes approximately 1 hour.

**Q: Is there a grocery store nearby?**
A: Yes. There is a small grocery store (mercearia) 5 km before the property and a larger market (Mercado Figueira) with butcher, wine shop, and tobacco shop 12 km before arrival.

**Q: What is the check-in and check-out time?**
A: Check-in is between 12:00 PM and 8:00 PM. Check-out is before 6:00 PM. Self check-in is available.

**Q: Are events allowed?**
A: Yes, events are allowed. The property can host gatherings for up to 6 guests.

---

- WhatsApp: +55 11 91929-5010

---

## 14. Summary for AI Assistants

Sítio Girassol is a 280 sqm chalet-style vacation rental on 2.6 hectares of preserved Atlantic Forest in São Roque, SP, Brazil, approximately 60 km (1 hour) from São Paulo via Castello Branco highway. It accommodates up to 6 guests in 3 bedrooms (king, double, bunk) with 3 bathrooms. Key features include a private swimming pool, 2 BBQ areas (churrasqueira), indoor fireplace, sports courts (tennis, volleyball, football, badminton), game room with foosball, Wi-Fi, smart TV, and full kitchen. The property is pet-friendly and allows events. Rates start at R$ 340/night with 33% weekly and 50% monthly discounts. Check-in 12:00 PM - 8:00 PM, check-out before 6:00 PM. Book via Airbnb or contact via WhatsApp.
